Who We Are

More Than Contractors —
We're Your Neighbors.

Desert Breeze Mechanical Contractors was founded with a commitment to dependable workmanship, clear communication, and respect for every home and business we enter. We're not just another service company — we're invested in the long-term comfort of our community here in El Paso.

From sweltering 100°F summers to those unexpectedly cold desert nights, our job is to make sure your indoor environment feels exactly right — for your home and your business. When you call Desert Breeze, you're calling a local team that actually cares.

🛡️ Proud service contractor for Old Republic Home Protection — we handle warranty claims so you don't have to stress.

Expert installations
Fast troubleshooting
All brands serviced
Dependable repairs
Commercial & residential
Honest assessments
Talk to Our Team
What We Do

Complete HVAC Solutions
For Every Need

Comprehensive HVAC services for residential and commercial properties across El Paso and surrounding areas.

❄️
Central AC & Mini-Split Installation

New central systems, ductless mini-splits, and heat pumps properly sized and installed for your home — efficient, reliable, and built to handle El Paso's extreme heat.

🔧
Emergency AC Repair — Same Day

Fast, accurate diagnosis and same-day repair for all AC failures — all makes and models. When it's 105° outside, you can't wait days for a technician.

🌡️
Heat Pump & Furnace Repair

Furnaces, heat pumps, gas and electric systems serviced and repaired. Stay comfortable through El Paso's cold desert nights — we diagnose and fix on the same visit whenever possible.

🏢
Commercial Rooftop Units

Full-service installation, repair, and maintenance of commercial rooftop units and packaged systems — for offices, restaurants, retail spaces, and warehouses across El Paso.

🏠
Preventive Maintenance Plans

Scheduled tune-ups, filter changes, coil cleaning, and full system inspections — catch small issues before they become costly failures. Ask us about annual maintenance plans.

⚡
High-Efficiency System Upgrades

An aging system costs you money every single month. Upgrade to a high-SEER unit, reduce your energy bills, and improve home comfort — we handle permits and full installation.

Common Questions

Have Questions?
We Have Answers.

If you don't see your question here, our team is happy to help with anything HVAC-related.

Ask Us Directly
We provide clear, upfront estimates for installations and major work. For service calls and diagnostics, a trip fee may apply — we'll always be transparent about pricing before any work begins.
Yes. Desert Breeze Mechanical Contractors is a fully licensed HVAC contractor (TACLA69448R) and carries appropriate insurance for all residential and commercial service work in Texas.
We recommend service at least twice a year — once before summer heat and once before winter. In El Paso's extreme climate, regular maintenance prevents costly breakdowns and keeps efficiency high.
Yes. We specialize in both. Whether you're a homeowner or a business owner managing multiple commercial units, Desert Breeze has the expertise to handle your needs professionally.
We service all major brands — Carrier, Trane, Lennox, Rheem, York, Goodman, American Standard, and more. If you have it, we can service it.
Key signs: system is 10–15+ years old, frequent repairs, rising energy bills, or inconsistent temperatures. We'll give you an honest assessment — if repair is the smarter call, we'll tell you. No pressure.
Yes. Desert Breeze Mechanical Contractors is a service contractor for Old Republic Home Protection. If your home warranty plan covers HVAC repairs, we can work directly with your warranty claim — contact us and we'll help coordinate the process.
Yes. HVAC emergencies don't wait for business hours — especially in El Paso's extreme heat. Call (915) 727-1200 and we'll get to you as fast as possible.
